context: Knowledge Resources Plane detail for the seven-plane operating system. Covers memory, knowledge, vault, repo, source, and world-model assets with explicit source-of-record boundaries.

sections.content: Knowledge Resources Plane owns memory, knowledge, vault, repo, source, and world-model assets with explicit source-of-record boundaries. Knowledge Resources Plane separates operational console from canonical truth.

Must_not = undifferentiated store or duplicate portfolio semantics. Current posture = active-source-of-record. knowledge/ is admitted seed. llm-wiki is operational console candidate, not default source-of-record.

changelog.delta: Initial seven-plane pilot module for Knowledge Resources Plane.
